chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-447 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Office Objection. 2. For orders on Misc. No.2114/2024. 3. For orders on Misc. No.2115/2024. 4. For hearing of main case. 26.09.2024. No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioner and no intimation has been received. The instant Petition has been pending since 24.01.2024 without having effectively been pursued. Even otherwise, the Petition does not appear to be maintainable inasmuch as the Petitioner has sought to impugn an order made by the Banking Court. Under such circumstances, the instant Petition stands dismissed accordingly alongwith other Miscellaneous Applications. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
